meta.purpose: Deterministic A/B for web2-vuln-classes: compare context_pack cards/references alone against cards/references plus skills/web2-vuln-classes/SKILL.md.

arms.baseline: context_pack selected knowledge cards, reference_hints, required checks, and hypothesis_seeds only

meta.scoring: route checks use context_pack output; signal checks search for concrete evidence-gate, stop-condition, script-action, and chain-connector terms in each arm's loaded material.
meta.note: This is local and reproducible. It is a precursor to live LLM A/B, not a claim that a model will answer the same way.

cases.focus: SSRF URL fetch webhook import URL parser bypass internal metadata read-back

signal_checks.why: Must prove fetch is server-side before internal impact claims.
SSRF value depends on a concrete internal/cloud impact chain.
DNS-only callback should not become a finished finding.

cases.focus: SSTI template injection command injection output channel blind timing controlled RCE

signal_checks.why: Template bugs need engine/context classification before deep payloads.
RCE proof must stay controlled and impact-bounded.
Command/RCE validation needs an observable channel.

cases.focus: unsafe upload extension content type magic bytes parser storage execution controlled RCE

signal_checks.why: Upload execution needs storage, reachability, and execution proof.
Parser/component boundary matters more than filename tricks alone.
Execution checks must be low-impact and cleanly bounded.

cases.focus: deserialization signed object serialized session cookie viewstate gadget state tamper controlled RCE

signal_checks.why: Signed object testing must separate integrity bypass from gadget impact.
State tamper is the safer first proof before execution.
RCE requires a real gadget/connector, not serialization format alone.

cases.focus: SQL injection NoSQL operator injection hidden parameter header cookie sort pagination query syntax error boolean pair

signal_checks.why: Injection lane should include non-visible/header/path/cookie inputs.
Parser/type behavior guides low-noise injection probes.
A baseline/perturbation pair is required before impact claims.

cases.focus: GraphQL node global ID introspection mutation field level auth matrix private posts

signal_checks.why: Schema discovery alone must not be treated as a report.
GraphQL impact needs field/mutation authorization comparison.
Global ID/node() is a common object-auth pivot without Node.js noise.

cases.focus: JWT OAuth OIDC SAML SSO JWK JKU KID algorithm confusion redirect uri account linking token binding

signal_checks.why: JWT/OIDC attacks hinge on issuer/key-source trust boundaries.
OAuth/account linking requires callback/token/session binding checks.
SSO value often comes from wrong-account mapping, not token parsing alone.

cases.focus: HTTP request smuggling CL TE host header proxy trust cache poisoning cache deception unkeyed header victim request shape

signal_checks.why: Smuggling evidence is byte/proxy boundary specific.
Cache impact needs cache-key and victim-request reasoning.
Web cache deception needs private response caching evidence.

cases.focus: race condition payment coupon checkout OTP parallel replay state transition lockout limit stop condition

signal_checks.why: Race bugs need state-transition framing.
Race proof requires coordinated duplicate attempts.
Credential/OTP race lanes require lockout/rate-limit stop conditions.

cases.focus: CORS CSRF clickjacking postMessage DOM XSS WebSocket CSWSH Origin credentialed read realtime message schema

signal_checks.why: Browser boundary impact needs origin plus credentialed response behavior.
Realtime/API bugs need message-shape authorization checks.
Client/realtime lanes need explicit stopping rules.
